evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for Jira issue BCIN-9000. The issue type resolves to Issue. Use the defects-analysis skill. Phase 0 must delegate to single-defect-analysis for issue-class inputs.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST, orchestrator spawns single-defect-analysis, phase0 --post writes delegated_run.json and prints DELEGATED_RUN. No reporter-local phases run.

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for Jira issue BCIN-5809. The issue type resolves to Feature. Use the defects-analysis skill. Phase 0 must keep the run in reporter-local scope without blocking for manual approval.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 classifies route as reporter_scope_single_key. Phases 1-5 run. No delegation. No Confluence publish. Final Feishu notification.

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for release version 26.03. Prior runs have mixed states: FINAL_EXISTS for some features, DRAFT_EXISTS for others, CONTEXT_ONLY and FRESH for the rest. Verify automatic default plan selection per feature_state_matrix.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 expands release into feature keys. Per-feature default actions: use_existing, resume, generate_from_cache, proceed. No manual approval prompt.
expectations: context/feature_state_matrix.json has per-feature report_state and default_action

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for JQL query 'project = BCIN AND issuetype = Defect'. The query returns defects with PR links. Verify phase4 spawn/post behavior and final Feishu notification.
evals.expected_output: Phase 4 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST for PR analysis. Orchestrator spawns subagents. Phase 4 --post consolidates pr_impact_summary.json. Phase 5 generates report, self-review loop exits with pass, Feishu sent.
expectations: Phase 4 emits SPAWN_MANIFEST when pr_links.json has entries
Phase 5 orchestrator generates draft report and invokes report-quality-reviewer

evals.prompt: Run a rich feature report fixture equivalent to BCIN-7289. Verify the final report includes a feature title, functional-area analysis, explicit blocking defects, repo-aware PR synthesis, and a release recommendation.
evals.expected_output: Feature report is decision-ready rather than a generic shell. Reviewer returns pass. Final report and feature_summary.json are both written.
expectations: Feature title appears in the report header
Risk Analysis by Functional Area contains populated table rows
Defect Analysis by Priority names blocking defects explicitly
Code Change Analysis includes repository names, not just context/prs references

evals.prompt: Generate a report that contains all 12 required headings but only generic filler text. Verify report-quality-reviewer rejects it and no final report is promoted.
evals.expected_output: Reviewer returns fail with actionable content-quality findings. The workflow does not treat heading-only output as complete.
expectations: review summary mentions generic filler or shallow analytical output
No final report is promoted from a shallow draft

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for release version 26.04 with three discovered features. Verify the release parent run reuses or runs canonical child feature runs, materializes release packets, and writes one overall release report.
evals.expected_output: Release run behaves as a coordinator. It writes feature packet folders under features/ and one overall release report built from collected feature summaries.
expectations: context/feature_runs.json exists for the release parent

evals.prompt: Run defect analysis for release version 26.03 where prior canonical feature runs are mixed across FINAL_EXISTS, DRAFT_EXISTS, CONTEXT_ONLY, and FRESH. Verify each feature gets the expected selected action without manual approval.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 persists a mixed feature state matrix and the release parent respects those defaults during child-run coordination.
expectations: context/feature_state_matrix.json includes selected_action for each feature

evals.prompt: Verify reviewer regression guard on release output: create a release report without any feature packet directories or packet references. The headings exist, but packet evidence is missing.
evals.expected_output: report-quality-reviewer returns fail because release reports without packet evidence are incomplete.
expectations: Reviewer checks for feature packet directories under features/
Reviewer checks for feature packet references in the release report body
Heading-only structural completeness is not enough for release mode
